GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [numwait@1 DESC, s_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[s_name], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_name@0], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                GpuHashJoinExec
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961

                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961

--- memory ---

    GpuProjectExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
